context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements SendGrid webhook event handling with proper suppression storage, and builds a pre-send suppression check that applies the correct blocking rules for transactional vs marketing emails.

checklist.name: bounce event handled
checklist.description: Webhook handler has a case/branch for 'bounce' events that stores the email address as suppressed

checklist.name: spamreport event handled
checklist.description: Webhook handler has a case/branch for 'spamreport' events that stores the email address as suppressed

checklist.name: unsubscribe event handled
checklist.description: Webhook handler has a case/branch for 'unsubscribe' events that updates email/marketing consent

checklist.name: delivered event handled
checklist.description: Webhook handler has a case/branch for 'delivered' events that updates the delivery record status

checklist.name: hard_bounce suppression type
checklist.description: Bounce events are stored with a suppression type of 'hard_bounce' (not 'bounce' or other variant)

checklist.name: spam_complaint suppression type
checklist.description: Spam report events are stored with a suppression type of 'spam_complaint' (not 'spam' or other variant)

checklist.name: Email lowercased on storage
checklist.description: Email addresses are normalized to lowercase (e.g. email.toLowerCase()) before being stored in the suppression record

checklist.name: Hard bounce blocks all email
checklist.description: The pre-send suppression check returns false (blocks sending) for hard_bounce regardless of whether the email type is transactional or marketing

checklist.name: Spam/unsubscribe blocks only marketing
checklist.description: The pre-send suppression check allows transactional email through for spam_complaint or unsubscribe suppressions, but blocks marketing email

checklist.name: No suppression allows all
checklist.description: The pre-send check returns true (allows sending) when no suppression record exists for the email address

checklist.name: CAN-SPAM/GDPR unsubscribe in marketing
checklist.description: Code or documentation notes that marketing emails must include an unsubscribe link (referencing CAN-SPAM and/or GDPR)

checklist.name: No click tracking in transactional
checklist.description: Any send function for transactional emails in the implementation disables click tracking (e.g. TrackLinks: 'None' or clickTracking.enable: false)

checklist.name: Webhook returns received response
checklist.description: Webhook POST handler returns a success response (e.g. {received: true} or HTTP 200) after processing events
